name: Test databao build with BigQuery using BigQueryServiceAccountJsonAuth auth type
description: Initialize a project with BigQuery and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.
descriptionHtml: Initialize a project with BigQuery and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

testStage.description: Initialize a project with BigQuery and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.
